notable_shifts: Increased demand for remote work with 26% of listings available remotely
Skills in data analysis and software development remain in high demand
Manila continues to be the top hiring city
summary_text: The Philippine job market remains competitive, with Manila being the top hiring city and data analysis and software development skills in high demand. With 26% of listings available remotely, flexibility is becoming increasingly important for job seekers.
